title: The Tools Qwen Uses
description: Master every tool Qwen Code has access to. Read, Write, Edit, Shell, Grep, Glob, and Web Fetch — deep dive into each.
learning_objectives: Use the Read tool for single files, multiple files, and paginated reading
Use the Write tool to create structured content from scratch
Use the Edit tool for targeted changes, search-and-replace, and multi-edit
Run advanced shell commands with background processes, piping, and error handling
Search code with regex patterns, file type filters, and directory exclusions using Grep
Match file patterns with Glob including wildcards, exclusions, and combined tool workflows
Fetch web content, work with APIs, extract JSON, and handle errors and rate limits
